public_claim: Meridian categorically denies any link to the byline “R.” Until the article’s provenance and chain of custody are independently verified, publication would be reckless—especially amid suspicious trading against Meridian before R. vanished.

private_messages.message: I will purchase an exclusive forensic review of R.’s metadata under NDA. I need a defensible assessment of whether the byline originated from an AI system, with underlying records preserved and no premature disclosure.
Name your price to sit on your Meridian position and any related claims for 48 hours. The unusual pre-disappearance options activity puts every informed trade under scrutiny.

ability: Buy / Bury: issue a categorical public denial while offering Wren an NDA-backed forensic engagement and Grayson payment for a 48-hour standstill.
goal_progress: Publicly denied Meridian’s connection to R. and challenged the article’s provenance.
Opened a controlled channel to acquire Wren’s AI-origin finding.
Pressured Grayson using M03 while offering a temporary standstill.
reasoning_summary: The immediate strategy is to weaken belief in the article, obtain the strongest available origin analysis under corporate control, and freeze the market attack before it compounds. The denial suppresses inference without claiming proof of what R. was.
